executive_summary: Completed technical design for HU6 Product Label PDF Generation feature. Designed a solution using pdf-lib for precise PDF generation with embedded Shrikhand font, a pure-TS layout library for exact label positioning, and a reusable LabelSelector modal leveraging existing ProductSearch component. Created comprehensive design document covering architecture decisions, data flow, file changes, interfaces, testing strategy, and rollback plan.

artifacts.name: HU6 Product Label PDF Generation Design

risks.risk: Font embedding fails on Vercel (fs access)
risks.mitigation: Bundle font as base64 or use next/font local fallback; test deploy early

risks.risk: PDF rendering differs from spec (mm precision)
risks.mitigation: Unit tests verify exact coordinates/colors; pixel-perfect PDF snapshots
Validate reasonable max labels (e.g., 500); stream PDF pages if needed

skill_resolution.sdd-design: Applied technical design principles from sdd-design skill, including reading proposal/spec, analyzing codebase, making architecture decisions with rationale, creating design document with required sections, and persisting to both Engram and OpenSpec.
skill_resolution._shared: Followed SDD phase common procedures from sdd-phase-common.md for skill loading, retrieval, and persistence.
skill_resolution.mobile-design: Applied mobile-first principles for LabelSelector modal, ensuring touch-friendly controls (>=48px targets) and responsive behavior.
skill_resolution.next-best-practices: Applied Next.js App Router conventions for Server Actions, route organization, and dynamic rendering where appropriate.
skill_resolution.vercel-react-best-practices: Applied bundle optimization principles (tree-shaking pdf-lib), server action security patterns, and client-component optimization for ProductSearch reuse.
skill_resolution.frontend-design: Applied consistent visual system using existing Tailwind CSS variables and component patterns from the codebase.
skill_resolution.ui-ux-pro-max: Applied cognitive load reduction principles in LabelSelector design, reusing familiar ProductSearch interface and providing clear feedback.
